title: Temporal Additions
description: Temporal Additions is the biggest addon for NTM to exist so far, expanding its mechanics, adding new features, items and blocks from both New and Classic Doctor Who, while also adding "artifacts" and other interesting things!
body:
About

Temporal Additions is an add-on for the New TARDIS Mod that aims to extend and add on to it's features, with some, desired by the NTM community, and in the future, we plan to only expand the mod even more, and still having NTM as its core and main theme.
We want to offer a breath of fresh air to seasoned users of NTM and those who would like to see new content. Balancing will be one of our most important problems to solve.
As of now, this mod requires nothing more than New TARDIS Mod for safe work on both server and client. Consider joining our Discord server if you want to get a peek on mod's development progression or if you have any feedback!

 

Features

Currently implemented features include:

    Manual with detailed information on the features
    New Artron Capacitors and Batteries
    Roundel Containers
    New Upgrades
    New TARDIS traits
    More flight events
    Food Cube Machine from Classic Doctor Who
    Advanced Quantiscope for crafting items added by the mod
    Artifacts...
    New dimensions and structures
    And even more!

Discord

For any questions, suggestions or to report issues (GitHub Issue would be appreciated too), feel free to join our Discord server!
